key_metrics: Diluted EPS of $0.29 (up from $0.28 in Q3 2024)
Food, beverage and packaging costs of $902.4 million
qoq_changes: Net income decreased 12.4% sequentially to $382.1 million in Q3 2025 from $436.1 million in Q2 2025.
new_risks: Margin compression is evident as total operating expenses grew 8.9% YoY, outpacing the 7.5% YoY revenue growth.
Specific qualitative risk factors (Item 1A) were omitted from the provided excerpt.
management_tone: Neutral, balancing solid 7.5% top-line revenue growth against margin pressures from rising food and labor costs that caused a slight dip in net income.
analyst_note: Chipotle delivered steady Q3 2025 revenue growth of 7.5% YoY to $3.0 billion, though profitability faced headwinds with net income contracting 1.4% YoY due to elevated operating expenses. Despite the net income decline, aggressive share repurchases reduced the share count, allowing diluted EPS to edge higher to $0.29.
